Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.sys

Class Dpe.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.sys.Dpe.Builder
Enclosing class:
Dpe
public static class Dpe.Builder extends Object
Helps constructing a DPE.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder()
      Creates a builder for a front-end DPE. The front-end DPE contains the registration service used by the orchestrators to find running worker DPEs and engines.

      A front-end DPE is also a worker DPE that can run user engines, so it is recommended to run a front-end when using ERSAP on a local box. In multi-node ERSAP distributions it is mostly used a discovery and gateway for workers DPEs.

    • Builder

      public Builder(String frontEndHost)
      Creates a builder for a worker DPE. A worker DPE mainly runs user engines as part of a cloud of DPEs. All worker DPEs must register with the main front-end DPE.

      When running ERSAP on single node, a front-end DPE must be used instead of a worker DPE.

      Parameters:
      frontEndHost - the host address of the front-end

    • Builder

      public Builder(String frontEndHost, int frontEndPort)
      Creates a builder for a worker DPE. A worker DPE mainly runs user engines as part of a cloud of DPEs. All worker DPEs must register with the main front-end DPE.

      When running ERSAP on single node, a front-end DPE must be used instead of a worker DPE.

      Parameters:
      frontEndHost - the host address of the front-end
      frontEndPort - the port number of the front-end

  • Method Details

    • withHost

      public Dpe.Builder withHost(String host)
      Uses the given host for the local address.
      Parameters:
      host - the local address for the DPE
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withPort

      public Dpe.Builder withPort(int port)
      Uses the given port for the local address.
      Parameters:
      port - the local port for the DPE
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withSession

      public Dpe.Builder withSession(String id)
      Sets a session for this DPE.
      Parameters:
      id - the session ID for the DPE
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withReportPeriod

      public Dpe.Builder withReportPeriod(long interval, TimeUnit unit)
      Sets the interval of time between publishing reports.
      Parameters:
      interval - the report interval for the DPE
      unit - the time unit for the report interval
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withPoolSize

      public Dpe.Builder withPoolSize(int poolSize)
      Sets the size of the thread-pool that will process requests.
      Parameters:
      poolSize - the size of the thread-pool
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withMaxCores

      public Dpe.Builder withMaxCores(int maxCores)
      Sets the number of cores that a service can use in parallel.
      Parameters:
      maxCores - the maximum number of cores for a service
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • withDescription

      public Dpe.Builder withDescription(String description)
      Sets a description for this DPE.
      Parameters:
      description - the description of the DPE
      Returns:
      this builder, so methods can be chained

    • build

      public Dpe build()
      Creates the DPE.
      Returns:
      a new DPE
